description_long: This is a classic Santa Claus hat, featuring a bright red conical body with a soft, plush white band encircling the base. The hat tapers to a point that droops to one side, ending in a fluffy white pom-pom. The red fabric appears to be made of a soft, velvety material, while the white trim and pom-pom are likely faux fur or fleece, giving the hat a cozy and festive appearance. The crown is rounded and voluminous, designed to fit comfortably on a human head. There are no visible logos, patterns, or additional embellishments aside from the traditional color scheme and pom-pom. This hat is typically worn during the winter holiday season and is instantly recognizable as a symbol of Christmas.
description: A classic Santa Claus hat with a red velvety body, white plush trim, and a fluffy white pom-pom at the tip. The hat is rounded and festive, perfect for holiday celebrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded red crown and the white plush band encircling the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the drooping pointed tip and the fluffy white pom-pom.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the conical shape and the way the tip curves to one side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curve of the hat and the prominent pom-pom.
attribute_crown_shape: rounded and conical with a drooping tip
